summary: Created running card for batched Pod-image rebuild changes; first item: /wrapper/models/delete remote uninstall endpoint.
Added batch item 2: fast model download via aria2c (wrapper _run_install + Dockerfile apt aria2).
Added rebuild candidates 3 (--cache-lru 2 model-cache fix, decision pending) + 4 (wrapper /free for remote memory release).
Added candidate 5: future cu130 Blackwell image profile.
Repair: invalid status accumulating -> active (schema status family is active/accepted; accumulating intent kept in description).

Repair: completed partial links to full 8-key set (brief/plan/checklist/validation/files/events/handoffs/research) so the board renders the TASK WORKSPACE panel. Partial links = empty/broken-looking card.
Repair: moved long-form description (2788 chars) to brief.md; description now a 1-line summary per schema (description = short card summary, long-form belongs in brief.md).

Items 1 (remote /wrapper/models/delete) + 2 (aria2c fast download) now in pushed image. App POD_IMAGE_VERSION->v0.4.0, WRAPPER_VERSION->0.2.3. cu128 GHCR push in progress. PENDING (USER): fresh Pod redeploy + live verify; candidates 3/4/5 remain.

No behavior change. Replied to MPI-64 (msg c204bbb4). PENDING USER: live re-test /wrapper/models/delete deletes from volume (confirm-dialog flow MpiModelManager.js:237->downloadService.js:80). L1/L2 (Blackwell createPod 400 + dropped 400 body in remoteProxy _createPodInternal) routed as next remoteProxy.js item.

Committed 2c2fb1a: v0.4.0 app cutover (POD_IMAGE_VERSION v0.4.0 + WRAPPER_VERSION 0.2.3) + L2 fix (_createRejectReason surfaces RunPod createPod reject body in log+dialog; was bare 'create returned 400') + stale uninstall comments. L1 (Blackwell createPod 400 cause) now SURFACEABLE but unknown until a live Blackwell Connect prints the reason = USER step. UI already shows data.message (MpiSettings.js:578), no renderer change.
